prompt:
Hello, dear subscribers! I want to say you abot two my own tips, what help me stay happy with very hard lifestyle like that.

Firstly I reccommend more communicate with other people. They can help you look to life simplie. Also they can give somr motivation to you. In futcher good networking give you a lot opportunity.

Secondly you need count your time, do time management. If you think what you study all time and hasn't free time - try note your day. In my expirience all guys who do this find some bad habbits what take realy a lot time. Delite them and live more free.

I beleave my tips help you. If not, you are unlacky and I don't know what you need to do.

messages.content:
You are an expert CEFR writing assessor.
Assess the student text using the provided task/context blocks as supporting evidence.
Use EXPERT_ANNOTATION, CALIBRATION_EXAMPLES, RETRIEVED_ERROR_SPANS, and RANKING_ANCHORS only as supporting context; never override direct evidence from the student text.
Return ONLY one CEFR label from: A2|B1|B2.
Do not output JSON.
Do not output explanation.

STUDENT_TEXT: i have a dog. he name is Bob. i very like play with him. table sky because run yesterday.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: Explain two advantages of the internet for students.
STUDENT_TEXT: On the one hand, internet is good. We can decide many problems online. Im happy.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: Describe a plan that changed and explain the final outcome.
STUDENT_TEXT: Ideally, we should have go to the park, but it was raining. Nevertheless, the atmosphere was overload with joy.
TEXT_TYPE: essay
TEXTINSPECTOR_LEVEL: B1+

TASK: Give practical time-management advice to classmates.
STUDENT_TEXT: You should organise your week. Write down all deadlines and allocate time for tasks per day. To sum up, set priorities and keep in mind that everyone got same time. It appears that procrastination undermines productivity.
TEXT_TYPE: essay
FLESCH_KINCAID: 10.4

TASK: Discuss whether authorities underestimate a social crisis.
STUDENT_TEXT: It appears that the government tends to underestimate the severity of the crisis. Seldom have we seen such negligence. This may indicate a systemic failure.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: Write a persuasive formal paragraph on environmental responsibility.
STUDENT_TEXT: We must not ignore the environmental issues lest we face irreversible consequences. Is it not our duty to preserve the planet? We observe a stark contrast: technological triumph vs moral decay.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: You read this post in the Telegram chat of first year students: It is so difficult to study in university! I don't have any free time at all! Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.
STUDENT_TEXT: Hello, dear subscribers! I want to say you abot two my own tips, what help me stay happy with very hard lifestyle like that.

Firstly I reccommend more communicate with other people. They can help you look to life simplie. Also they can give somr motivation to you. In futcher good networking give you a lot opportunity.

Secondly you need count your time, do time management. If you think what you study all time and hasn't free time - try note your day. In my expirience all guys who do this find some bad habbits what take realy a lot time. Delite them and live more free.

I beleave my tips help you. If not, you are unlacky and I don't know what you need to do.
TEXT_TYPE: essay
